title: Lineum Core (v1.0.4-core): reference implementation & evidence bundle
description: Reference implementation of the Lineum core (v1.0.4-core) with canonical HTML reports and CSV/PNG artifacts. The paper (whitepaper/lineum-core.md) is the methodological core: it anchors the canonical tone f0, SI conversions (E, λ, display-only m/m_e), and falsifiable checks (C1/C2/C3). Evidence lives in output/; each HTML report is ground truth and commit-stamped.
notes: Core paper is included as whitepaper/lineum-core.md (CC-BY-4.0 intended for the manuscript text and figures). Software is MIT-licensed. Display-only mass is a unit conversion from f0 (no rest-mass claim).
